footer.tagline: Digital Trust in the Age of AI.

hero.tagline: Cyber resilience in the age of AI.
hero.subtitle: We combine security operations, compliance engineering, and AI governance for organizations operating across complex digital frontiers.

about.heading_l1: The ancient art of the Firewatch,
about.quote: "The word Brandvakt means 'Firewatch'. We ensure the fire burns smoothly, doesn't spread, contain it if something goes wrong, and ensure the safety of everyone."

capabilities.heading: Our Capabilities
capabilities.assessment_desc: Gap analysis and risk scoring against recognized frameworks — ISO 27001, NIST CSF, CIS Controls.
capabilities.network_desc: Monitor and harden networks transmitting protected data across distributed operations.
capabilities.vuln_desc: Continuous assessment, prioritized by risk exposure, with precise remediation guidance.
capabilities.identity_desc: Identities are the new perimeter. Protecting workforce access and consumer credentials.
capabilities.endpoint_desc: Advanced protection for employee devices against an evolving and adversarial threat surface.
capabilities.pentest_desc: Simulated ethical attacks to find vulnerabilities before adversaries can exploit them.
capabilities.awareness_desc: Training programs that address the human factor — your ultimate line of defence.
capabilities.grc_desc: Navigate SWIFT, PCI DSS, LGPD, and DORA with executable security and data frameworks.
capabilities.cloud_desc: Secure cloud perimeters across AWS, Azure, Google, or complex multi-tenant environments.

soc.desc: Continuous monitoring of endpoints, networks, and user activity for high-fidelity indicators of compromise — before damage is done.
soc.check2: Outsourced, managed, or collaborative SOC models

products.heading: Purpose-built platforms
products.desc_homodeus: Operational AI systems that replace manual workflows, automate decisions, and compound capability over time.
products.desc_academy: Recognized cybersecurity training programs built by active industry practitioners, for real-world application.
products.desc_bygrc: AI-powered GRC document intelligence. Centralized access to frameworks, controls, and compliance dashboards.

cta.heading_l2: on the right side of the fence.
cta.sub: Security-minded experts committed to your business continuity. We are the Firewatch.
cta.form_success: Thanks — your mail client should be opening. If it didn't, write to
cta.ph_message: Tell us about your security needs...

phisher.subtitle: Automated Phishing Simulation & Human Risk Management
phisher.lede: Deploy realistic phishing simulations across your organization, identify vulnerable users, and build cyber resilience with targeted training interventions.
phisher.caps_title: Everything you need to manage human risk
phisher.feat_campaigns_desc: Schedule and deploy realistic phishing simulations with 1,000+ customizable templates targeting your organization's specific threat profile.
phisher.feat_targeting_desc: Personalize campaigns by department, role, location, and risk profile for maximum behavioral insight.
phisher.feat_dashboard_desc: Track click rates, reporting rates, and user vulnerability scores with executive-ready dashboards.
phisher.feat_triggers_desc: Automatically enroll at-risk users in targeted security awareness training when they fail simulations.
phisher.feat_score_desc: Each user receives a dynamic risk score based on simulation performance, training completion, and behavioral indicators.
phisher.step_configure_desc: Select from 1,000+ realistic templates, choose your target audience, and schedule your simulation window.
phisher.step_launch_desc: PhishER automatically delivers personalized phishing attempts across your organization with full tracking.
phisher.step_analyze_desc: Review detailed reports showing who clicked, who reported, and which departments need attention.
phisher.step_remediate_desc: Users who fail are automatically enrolled in targeted microlearning modules to address specific vulnerabilities.
phisher.cta_sub: See how PhishER measures and reduces human risk across your organization.
phisher.meta_desc: Automated Phishing Simulation & Human Risk Management. Deploy realistic phishing simulations, identify vulnerable users, and build cyber resilience with targeted training interventions.

compliance.subtitle: Regulatory Compliance Intelligence for Global Enterprises
compliance.lede: Navigate complex regulatory landscapes with automated compliance tracking, audit-ready reporting, and Human Risk scoring across ISO 27001, LGPD, GDPR, and more.
compliance.feat_multi_desc: Track compliance across ISO 27001, ISO 37001, LGPD, GDPR, SOC 2, NIST, and 30+ other frameworks simultaneously.
compliance.feat_paths_desc: Industry-specific compliance journeys for Financial Services, Healthcare, Government, Energy, and more.
compliance.feat_reports_desc: Generate compliance evidence packages, gap analyses, and executive dashboards ready for internal and external audits.
compliance.feat_score_desc: Quantify human risk at the individual, department, and organizational level to prioritize compliance interventions.
compliance.feat_policy_desc: Distribute, track acknowledgment, and version-control policies, codes of conduct, and regulatory documents.
compliance.feat_map_desc: Visualize compliance status across countries, regions, and legal entities with jurisdiction-specific regulatory mapping.
compliance.step_select_desc: Choose the regulations and standards applicable to your organization, industry, and operating jurisdictions.
compliance.step_map_desc: The platform maps your regulatory requirements to training modules, policies, and controls automatically.
compliance.step_assign_desc: Distribute compliance training, policy acknowledgments, and assessments across your workforce with full tracking.
compliance.step_report_desc: Generate audit evidence, compliance certificates, and executive reports to demonstrate regulatory adherence.
compliance.cta_sub: See how Compliance Suite turns regulatory complexity into a clear, measurable program.
compliance.meta_desc: Regulatory Compliance Intelligence for Global Enterprises. Navigate complex regulatory landscapes with automated compliance tracking, audit-ready reporting, and Human Risk scoring across ISO 27001, LGPD, GDPR, and more.

awareness.subtitle: Multi-Language Corporate Training at Global Scale
awareness.lede: Distribute, monitor, and certify cybersecurity and compliance training across your entire organization in 6+ languages with enterprise-grade controls.
awareness.feat_interactive_desc: Engage employees with scenario-based learning in 6+ languages, including full RTL support for Arabic and Hebrew.
awareness.feat_assignment_desc: Assign mandatory training by department, role, location, or regulation with automated reminders and escalation.
awareness.feat_cert_desc: Automatically issue tamper-proof digital certificates with QR codes upon successful course completion.
awareness.feat_ai_desc: Brandvakt AI analyzes individual performance and recommends personalized learning paths to close knowledge gaps.
awareness.feat_analytics_desc: Track completion rates, scores, engagement, and compliance status across the entire organization with exportable reports.
awareness.feat_sso_desc: Connect with Microsoft 365, Google Workspace, Okta, SAP, Workday, and other enterprise systems for seamless user provisioning.
awareness.step_import_desc: Sync users from your HR system or Active Directory. Set up departments, roles, and reporting hierarchies in minutes.
awareness.step_assign_desc: Select from our library or upload custom content. Configure mandatory courses, deadlines, and passing scores by audience.
awareness.step_complete_desc: Users receive personalized notifications and complete training on any device in their preferred language.
awareness.step_measure_desc: Monitor real-time progress, generate compliance reports, and export audit-ready documentation for regulators.
awareness.cta_sub: See how Security Awareness scales training and certification worldwide.
awareness.meta_desc: Multi-Language Corporate Training at Global Scale. Distribute, monitor, and certify cybersecurity and compliance training across your organization in 6+ languages with enterprise-grade controls.
